title: Act 26 2025 - Public Persons (Declaration of Assets Liabilities and Business Interests) (Amendment) Act 2025
text:
[23rd Decem b e r 2 0 2 5 ] Public P ersons (Declaration of Assets, Liabilities and Business 407
Interests)(Amendment) Act
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE BILL
PUBLIC PERSONS (DECLARATION OF ASSETS, LIABILITIES AND BUSINESS
INTERESTS) (AMENDMENT) ACT, 2025
(Act 26 of 2025)
ARRANGEMENT OF SECTIONS
SECTIONS
1. Short title
2. Amendment section 2
3. Amendment of section 8
4. Substitution of Second Schedule

[23rd Decem b e r 2 0 2 5 ] Public P ersons (Declaration of Assets, Liabilities and Business 408
Interests)(Amendment) Act
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE BILL
PUBLIC PERSONS (DECLARATION OF ASSETS, LIABILITIES AND BUSINESS
INTERESTS) (AMENDMENT) ACT, 2025
(Act 26 of 2025)
I assent
22nd December, 2025
AN ACT TO AMEND THE PUBLIC PERSONS (DECLARATION OF ASSETS, LIABILITIES AND
BUSINESS INTERESTS) ACT, 2016 (ACT 26 OF 2016).
ENACTED BY THE PRESIDENT AND THE NATIONAL ASSEMBLY.
Short title
1. This Act may be cited as the Public Persons (Declaration of Assets, Liabilities and
Business Interests) (Amendment) Act, 2025.

[23rd Decem b e r 2 0 2 5 ] Public P ersons (Declaration of Assets, Liabilities and Business 409
Interests)(Amendment) Act
REPUBLIC OF SEYCHELLES SUPPLEMENT TO OFFICIAL GAZETTE BILL
Amendment of section 2
2. Section 2 of the Public Persons (Declaration of Assets, Liabilities and Business
Interests Act, 2016 (Act 26 of 2016) (hereinafter referred to as the “principal Act”) is
amended —
(a) in the definition of “liabilities” by inserting the words “or member of his or her
immediate family” after the words “public person”; and
(b) by inserting after the definition “liabilities”, the following definition —
‘ “member of immediate family” or “member of his or her immediate family” in
relation to a public person includes the public person’s spouse, any biological or
adoptive child who is below the age of eighteen years or any biological or adoptive
child whose means of support is wholly or partially from a public person,
irrespective of age;’.
Amendment of section 8
3. Section 8 of the principal Act is amended —
(i) by adding at the end of paragraph (a), the words “and the details of
members of his or her immediate family”;
(ii) in paragraph (e) —
(a) in subparagraphs (i), (ii), (iii) and (iv), after the words “he or she” the words
“or any member of his or her immediate family” shall be inserted;
(b) in subparagraphs (v) and (vi), after the words “jointly with any” the words
“member of his or her immediate family,” shall be inserted;
(iii) in paragraphs (f) and (g), after the words “he or she” the words “or any
member of his or her immediate family” shall be inserted.
Substitution of Second Schedule
4. Second Schedule to the principal Act is repealed and therefor substituting the
following Schedule —
“SECOND SCHEDULE
[Section 7(2) and Section 22]
DECLARATION OF ASSETS, LIABILITIES AND BUSINESS INTERESTS
INITIAL DECLARATION FORM
